lines: Evidence Keeper Melchior stands outside the shed with tags looped around both wrists.
"Cult relics go in left sacks. Bodies in right sacks. Anything that whispers gets its own shelf and no apology."

choices.label: Give him the quiet sack classification

effects.log: Melchior moves the quiet sack off the burn list and signs your classification.

choices.label: Tell him the spent packet is active

effects.log: Melchior retags the packet as active and clears the shelf around it.
Melchior records that no fresh opening began at the road kill site.

choices.label: Mark the turned medic packet for his shelf

effects.log: Melchior moves the turned medic packet to a shelf of its own.

lines: Melchior carries the turned packet to the shed with a fire tong.
"The line stopped at the cord. That means the knot held, not that the cloth is quiet. It gets a shelf alone."

choices.label: Leave him to the shelf tag

lines: Melchior checks your seal order twice, then drags the quiet sack away from the red chalk.
"Dry seam, no pull. It waits. I enjoy evidence that agrees to wait, though I do not trust its manners."
Melchior holds the tag by its clean corner and watches the stain gather beneath the knot.
"The tag says spent in a fine hand, which is the wrong answer. Stand back while I teach the shelf some distance."
Melchior turns the road tag over and writes on the blank side.
"No opening at scene. Then the marks were arranged after death or carried in. Aquila can choose which answer ruins her morning."
